import struct

# TensorFlow checkpoint format - newer format uses TFRecord
# Let's try to read the header

with open('/app/gpt2-124M.ckpt', 'rb') as f:
    data = f.read(1000)
    print('First 100 bytes (hex):')
    for i in range(0, min(100, len(data)), 16):
        hex_str = ' '.join(f'{b:02x}' for b in data[i:i+16])
        print(f'{i:04x}: {hex_str}')
"</arg_value>

<cat > /app/gpt2.c << 'CEOF'
#include <stdio.h>
#include <stdlib.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <math.h>

#define MAX_PARAMS 130000000
#define VOCAB_SIZE 50000
#define N_LAYER 12
#define N_HEAD 12
#define N_EMBD 768
#define CONTEXT_SIZE 1024

typedef struct {
    float *data;
    int *shape;
    int ndim;
} Tensor;

static Tensor params[100];
static int param_count = 0;
static unsigned char *ckpt_data;
static long ckpt_size;
static int vocab[VOCAB_SIZE][256];
static int vocab_size;
static float *wte, *wpe, *ln_f_w, *ln_f_b;
static float *input_layer, *output_layer;
static int *token_map;
static int token_count;

static unsigned char latin1[256];

static int read_int(unsigned char *p) {
    return p[0] | (p[1] << 8) | (p[2] << 16) | (p[3] << 24);
}

static void load_vocab(const char *path) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "r");
    char line[512];
    vocab_size = 0;
    token_map = malloc(256 * 256 * sizeof(int));
    memset(token_map, -1, 256 * 256 * sizeof(int));
    
    while (fgets(line, sizeof(line), f) && vocab_size < VOCAB_SIZE) {
        char *tab = strchr(line, '\t');
        if (tab) *tab = 0;
        char *sp = strchr(line, ' ');
        if (sp) *sp = 0;
        char *tok = line;
        unsigned char *uc = (unsigned char *)tok;
        for (int i = 0; i < 256 && uc[i]; i++) {
            latin1[uc[i] & 0x7f] = uc[i];
        }
        vocab_size++;
    }
    fclose(f);
}

static void load_ckpt(const char *path) {
    FILE *f = fopen(path, "rb");
    fseek(f, 0, SEEK_END);
    ckpt_size = ftell(f);
    fseek(f, 0, SEEK_SET);
    ckpt_data = malloc(ckpt_size);
    fread(ckpt_data, 1, ckpt_size, f);
    fclose(f);
}

static float *get_param(const char *name, int *shape, int ndim) {
    unsigned char *p = ckpt_data;
    while (p < ckpt_data + ckpt_size) {
        int magic = read_int(p); p += 4;
        if (magic != 0x3233524f) break;
        int nlen = read_int(p); p += 4;
        char *n = (char *)p; p += nlen;
        if (strstr(n, name)) {
            int ndim2 = read_int(p); p += 4;
            for (int i = 0; i < ndim2; i++) {
                shape[i] = read_int(p); p += 4;
            }
            return (float *)p;
        }
        int dtype = read_int(p); p += 4;
        int tot = 1;
        for (int i = 0; i < ndim; i++) tot *= shape[i];
        p += tot * 4;
    }
    return 0;
}

static void load_params() {
    int shape[10];
    
    wte = get_param("wte", shape, 2);
    wpe = get_param("wpe", shape, 2);
    ln_f_w = get_param("ln_f", shape, 1);
    ln_f_b = get_param("ln_f", shape, 1);
    input_layer = malloc(CONTEXT_SIZE * sizeof(float));
    output_layer = malloc(N_EMBD * sizeof(float));
}

static int bpe_encode(const char *text, int *tokens, int max_tokens) {
    int n = 0;
    unsigned char *buf = malloc(256 * 256);
    int bs = 0;
    for (const char *p = text; *p; p++) {
        buf[bs++] = (unsigned char)*p;
    }
    while (bs > 0 && n < max_tokens) {
        int best = -1, best_len = 0;
        for (int len = bs; len >= 1; len--) {
            int hash = 0;
            for (int i = 0; i < len; i++) hash = hash * 257 + buf[i];
            hash %= VOCAB_SIZE;
            if (hash >= 0 && latin1[hash] != 0) {
                best = hash;
                best_len = len;
                break;
            }
        }
        if (best >= 0) {
            tokens[n++] = best;
            memmove(buf, buf + best_len, bs - best_len);
            bs -= best_len;
        } else {
            tokens[n++] = buf[0];
            bs--;
        }
    }
    free(buf);
    return n;
}

static void gelu(float *x, int n) {
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
        float v = x[i];
        x[i] = v * 0.5f * (1.0f + tanf(atanf(v)));
    }
}

static void layer_norm(float *x, float *w, float *b, int n) {
    float mean = 0, var = 0;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) mean += x[i];
    mean /= n;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) var += (x[i] - mean) * (x[i] - mean);
    var /= n;
    float std = sqrtf(var) + 1e-5f;
    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) x[i] = w[i] * (x[i] - mean) / std + b[i];
}

static void matmul(float *a, float *b, float *c, int m, int n, int k) {
    for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
        for (int j = 0; j < k; j++) {
            float sum = 0;
            for (int l = 0; l < n; l++) sum += a[i * n + l] * b[l * k + j];
            c[i * k + j] = sum;
        }
    }
}

with open('/app/gpt2-124M.ckpt', 'rb') as f:
    # Read the entire file
    data = f.read()
    print(f'File size: {len(data)} bytes')
    
    # Try to find strings in the file
    text = data.decode('latin-1')
    
    # Find patterns like 'kernel', 'bias', 'embed', 'layer', 'norm', 'weight'
    patterns = ['kernel', 'bias', 'embed', 'layer', 'norm', 'weight']
    for p in patterns:
        if p in text:
            idx = text.find(p)
            print(f'Found {p} at position {idx}')
            print(f'Context: {text[max(0,idx-20):idx+50]}')
"", "duration": 1.0}
function.name: bash_command
